General.Name: Modern Land(China) Co Ltd
General.Description: Modern Land (China) Co., Limited engages in the real estate development in the People's Republic of China. The company develops and operates green technology systems, such as external structure insulation, window, noise isolation and reduction, external shading, ground-source heat pump, ceiling radiation, whole air displacement, same floor drainage, intelligent, and water optimizing treatment systems; and expansion systems. It is also involved in property investment, hotel operations, and real estate agency services and other related services. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China. Modern Land (China) Co., Limited is a subsidiary of Cititrust Private Trust (Cayman) Limited.

2.Name: Mr. Yin  Chen
2.Title: CTO, Head of Research & Development Department and Executive Director
